# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version  | Supported |
|----------|-----------|
| 0.14.x   | ✓         |
| < 0.14   | ✗         |

Being pre-1.0, only the latest released minor line receives security fixes;
upgrade to the newest `0.14.x` to stay supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Use [GitHub Private Security Advisory](https://github.com/hitoshyamamoto/soapbar/security/advisories/new)
— this creates a private thread visible only to you and the maintainer.

Include: description, reproduction steps, affected versions, suggested fix.

**Response:** acknowledgement within 48 h · assessment within 7 days ·
fix within 30 days (critical) or 90 days (others).
Fixes coordinated with reporter before public disclosure.
